meaning: n.出租马车的人,穿制服的仆役
examples: "Take the long hill road up, Thompson — it will be easier on the horses," called the liveryman as the undertaker snapped the door of the hearse and prepared to mount to the driver's seat.
Take the long hill road up, Thompson — it will be easier on the horses, "called the liveryman as the undertaker snapped the door of the hearse and prepared to mount to the driver's seat."
